text:
おっ！　ありがとう！
やってくれたんだな。
これでまぁ、なんとかなるかな？

ほんっとーに助かったよ。
仕事が多すぎて
パンクしかけてたもんでさ。

さーてと、お礼は何が
いいのかなっと……

そうだ、俺のパートナーカードやるよ。
仕事中でさえなけりゃ
すっ飛ん

Hey, nice! You really came through for me.
I think we can manage from here.

You're a lifesaver. Got too much damn work
as is. Clearin' those creatures out woulda
made me blow a gasket.
Let's see, how can I pay you back...

Oh, I know. You can have my Partner Card.
Use that, and I'll come runnin'.
Long as I'm not on the clock, that is.
